message:
feat(ufunc): add equal_nan, diff prepend/append, trim_zeros mode, packbits bitorder; fix histogram non-finite rejection

UFuncArray API additions for NumPy parity:
- array_equal_nan: equal_nan parameter for np.array_equal (NumPy 1.25+)
- isclose_equal_nan / allclose_equal_nan: equal_nan parameter for np.isclose/allclose
- diff_with: prepend/append parameters for np.diff (NumPy 1.16+)
- trim_zeros_mode: trim parameter ("f"/"b"/"fb") for np.trim_zeros
- packbits_order / unpackbits_order: bitorder parameter ("big"/"little") for np.packbits/unpackbits

Bug fix: histogram, histogram2d, histogramdd, and histogram_bin_edges now
reject non-finite values early on a per-element basis instead of only checking
the folded min/max, producing accurate error messages matching NumPy behavior.

IO fix: invert bool parse logic in parse_text_element_for_dtype (== 0.0 yields
0.0, nonzero yields 1.0). Clippy: use String::new() instead of "".to_string().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
